goal: Replace heuristic pitcher counting stat estimates in `_convert_fusion_proj_to_board_format` with mathematically sound formulas based on Statcast rate metrics (ERA, WHIP, K/9, etc.). Eliminate placeholders like `12 - era` and `era - 3`.
criteria: 1. Research and implement industry-standard translation constants for Wins, Losses, and Quality Starts based on ERA and IP. 2. Ensure all formulas are documented with docstrings referencing the mathematical rationale. 3. Existing tests in `tests/test_player_board_fusion.py` must pass. 4. Add at least 2 new test cases to verify the improved math.
